name: Mandel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and sugar until well combined. Add oil and lemon and orange rinds.
2. Gradually add flour and chopped nuts, stirring until just mixed.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
4. Divide the dough into four equal parts. Roll each portion into thin strips.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake the rolls for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before cutting into slices.
